documentation.content:
Circuit breaker alert: >5% server error rate over 5 minutes.

Runbook:
1. Check /admin/circuit-breaker endpoint
2. Review Cloud Run logs: gcloud logging read 'resource.labels.service_name="counselconduit"'
3. If circuit is OPEN, wait 60s cooldown or restart revision
4. Check model provider status if errors are from LiteLLM

conditionThreshold.filter: resource.type = "cloud_run_revision" AND resource.labels.service_name = "counselconduit" AND metric.type = "run.googleapis.com/request_count" AND metric.labels.response_code_class = "5xx"
